content.fact_text: Inventory Snapshot Engine (ISE) implemented for Stage 1 reconciliation using PostgreSQL serializable transactions and Redis-based distributed locking.

provenance_data.behaviour: Captures point-in-time inventory snapshots using serializable transactions with row-level locking, ensuring eventual consistency in inventory reconciliation. Uses Redis for distributed locking to prevent concurrent reconciliation runs for the same SKU range. Includes robust retry logic for transient database failures.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a resilient, ACID-compliant mechanism for capturing inventory states during the reconciliation process, critical for inventory integrity.
